title: Elden Ring
pros: Incredible sense of discovery and exploration
summary: Elden Ring represents the pinnacle of FromSoftware's legendary game design philosophy, combining the studio's signature challenging combat with a breathtaking open world created in collaboration with George R.R. Martin.
verdict: Elden Ring is a monumental achievement in game design. It successfully translates the Souls formula into an open world without losing what makes these games special. This is an essential experience for any action RPG fan.
